## Why Married Hindu Men are Endangered: A Case Study of Atul Subash

A in-depth conversation surrounding the deeper issues behind Atul Subash's tragic suicide recently

[](https://substack.com/@thedharmadispatch)

![The Dharma Dispatch's avatar](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!3Qms!,w_36,h_36,c_fill,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fa9d78c9b-fd9a-4bf5-a7c3-4cf0b040e7ba_500x500.png)

[The Dharma Dispatch](https://substack.com/@thedharmadispatch)

Dec 20, 2024

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

9

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

3

Share

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

Transcript

This is a detailed analysis of the tragic incident concerning the deceased Atul Subash and the roots of the issue.

The roots go all the way back to the destruction of the Hindu family system by passing a series of legislations dating back to the 1950s known as the Hindu Code Bill.

Ever since, there has been a continuous devaluation and erosion of the Hindu family and consequently, the Hindu society has been broken perhaps irreparably.

Arguably, the most draconian legislation that accelerated this break up of the Hindu society is the dreaded Section 498A. This law can be more properly called **The Revenge of Shurpanakha.**

This is an extremely worrisome, serious and grave situation that will have even more far-reaching consequences.

Do tune into this riveting conversation!

## An Appeal: Please Support our Sacred Work

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

If you enjoyed this episode, please consider supporting The Dharma Dispatch podcast so we can offer more such interesting, informative and educational content related to Indian History, Sanatana Dharma, Hindu Culture and current affairs.

**It takes us months of rigorous research, writing and editing and significant costs to offer this labour of love**.

Your support helps us keep our content free!
